meta.name: Dreams and Ruin (FFX)
meta.source: Inspired by Final Fantasy X: Besaid tropical waters, Tidus yellow, Sin's destruction, and ruined Zanarkand nights
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color tokens still live only in styles.css and are intentionally omitted here: --radius, --radius-s, --shadow. For stronger FFX identity, consider soft water caustic overlays in light mode and faint pyrefly drift plus fractured glow streaks in dark mode.

bg-soft.desc: Distant ruin glow over collapsed city edges

panel.desc: Primary panel in deep shattered indigo

panel-2.desc: Raised surface with cold ruin depth

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation with moonlit stone contrast

line.desc: Fractured blue frame line like broken neon remnants

line-soft.desc: Subtle divider in worn ruin steel

text.desc: Primary text with bright moonlit readability

muted.desc: Secondary labels in cold faded blue

accent.desc: Sin scarlet for primary interaction urgency

gold.desc: Pyrefly-cyan highlight for headings and totals

crystal-earth.desc: Earth analog - lingering life amid ruin

crystal-water.desc: Water analog - memory of Spira seas

done.desc: Recovered progress and calm after chaos

todo.desc: Pending state in tempered ruin blue

bg.desc: Besaid daylight sky and sea haze

panel.desc: Primary panel for bright island readability

panel-2.desc: Raised surface like sunlit shallow water

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation with reflective aqua lift

text.desc: Primary text with deep coastal contrast

accent.desc: Tidus blitzball yellow for primary interactions

excluded.desc: Set-aside state in soft driftwood gray-blue

danger.desc: Critical state in warm coral red
